questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Paging Internals?
options: Inefficient scaling of Page tables structures, virtual-to-physical mapping.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Page tables structures, virtual-to-physical mapping.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Page tables structures, virtual-to-physical mapping scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
